name: skills-hub
description: Ornevo Agency canonical skill library — categorized skills for data, engineering, design, legal, finance, operations, sales, marketing, HR, productivity, and Ornevo custom tools.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Answer data questions, write SQL queries, validate analysis, create visualizations, and explore datasets.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Accessibility audits, design critique, design handoff, design system management, research synthesis, and UX copy.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Architecture decisions, code review, debugging, deploy checklists, documentation, incident response, standup updates, system design, and technical debt management.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Audit support, close management, financial statements, journal entries, reconciliation, SOX testing, and variance analysis.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Compensation analysis, offer letters, interview prep, onboarding, org planning, people reports, performance reviews, policy lookup, and recruiting pipeline.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Legal briefs, compliance checks, legal responses, risk assessments, meeting briefings, contract review, signature requests, NDA triage, and vendor checks.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Brand review, campaign planning, content creation, draft content, email sequences, performance reports, and SEO audits.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Capacity planning, change requests, compliance tracking, process documentation, process optimization, risk assessment, runbooks, status reports, and vendor reviews.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Memory management, task management, start dashboard, and daily updates.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Account research, call prep, call summaries, competitive intelligence, daily briefings, draft outreach, forecasting, pipeline review, and sales asset creation.

plugins.name: ornevo-toolkit
plugins.description: Ornevo agency and freelance tool stack reference: n8n, Figma, OpenProject, Mattermost, SCM Analytics (Kings Pastry), and project conventions including Power BI data source documentation workflow.

plugins.name: ornevo-digest-audit
plugins.description: Monthly audit of the Ornevo Daily Digest system — source review, ranking, new topic evaluation, process improvements.
